Briefly describe what this PR does and why.

Closes #(issue number)

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `bun run build` and the build passes.
- [ ] I have run `bun run lint` and fixed any lint errors.
- [ ] I have run `bun run format` if needed.
- [ ] I have updated the README / DEVELOPMENT.md if the change affects setup or usage.
- [ ] I have tested the change in the local preview.
- [ ] My migrations follow the GRANT + RLS + POLICY pattern for new public tables.

## Screenshots / recordings

If the PR changes UI, include screenshots or a short recording.

Anything else reviewers should know.
